Package edu.touro.mco152.bm.ui

package edu.touro.mco152.bm.ui
A container for classes dealing with the user interface. This sets up the main window of the GUI, as well as various other frames containes therein. This class is of great importance to the current implementation of badBM, which is a GUI-only program.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    edu.touro.mco152.bm
     
    edu.touro.mco152.bm.persist
    A container for utility classes that help with handling persistent data.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Gui
    Creates and populates a graph with data from the current run, and stores gui references for easy access.
    MainFrame
    Creates the MainFrame with methods that enable easy control
